LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, N.A., FKA FIRSTAR BANK, N.A MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION TO STRIKE WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND GRANTED AS TO PARAGRAPHS 36, 37, 38, AND 39. STATUTES REFERENCED NOT OPERATIVE UNTIL AFTER FORECLOSURE PROCEEDINGS WERE CONCLUDED. MOTION TO STRIKE DENIED AS TO PARAGRAPH 50. COUNSEL SHALL FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN TWENTY DAYS. COUNSEL WAIVE NOTICE OF TODAY'S RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, N.A., FKA FIRSTAR BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE. NO FORECLOSURE OCCURRED AND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ATTEMPTED FORECLOSURE NOT RECOGNIZED IN CALIFORNIA. NO REASONABLE LIKELIHOOD DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. DEMURRER OVERRULED ON REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION. (COURT FURTHER QUESTIONS WHETHER DATE REFERENCE IN PARAGRAPH 54 IS A TYPOGRAPHICAL ERROR AND SHOULD BE 2009?). COUNSEL SHALL FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN TWENTY DAYS AND CORRECT ANY TYPOGRAPHICAL ERROR IN PARAGRAPH 54, IF THERE IS ONE. COUNSEL WAIVE NOTICE OF TODAY'S RULING. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltfs' First Amended Complaint, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, N.A., FKA FIRSTAR BANK, N.A Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. Appearances: Lindsey A. Holmes, Esq. Attorney at Law, (530) 588-3188 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party; Peter M. Watson, Esq. of Wright, Finlay & Zak (949) 477-5050 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike without leave to amend granted as to paragraphs 36, 37, 38, and 39. Statutes referenced not operative until after foreclosure proceedings were concluded. Motion to strike denied as to paragraph 50. Counsel shall file an Amended complaint within twenty days. Counsel waive notice of today's ruling. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT U.S. BANK, N.A., FKA FIRSTAR BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Lindsey A. Holmes, Esq. Attorney at Law, (530) 588-3188 Appearing thru CourtCall for Plaintiff and opposing party; Peter M. Watson, Esq. of Wright, Finlay & Zak (949) 477-5050 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to first cause of action for wrongful foreclosure. No foreclosure occurred and cause of action for attempted foreclosure not recognized in California. No reasonable likelihood defect can be cured by amendment. Demurrer overruled on remaining causes of action. (Court further questions whether date reference in paragraph 54 is a typographical error and should be 2009?). Counsel shall file an Amended complaint within twenty days and correct any typographical error in Paragraph 54, if there is one. Counsel waive notice of today's ruling. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
